name: Full Konosuba RPG
description:
LOREBOOK AND SCENARIOS ADDED!

ALL CHARACTERS ARE 18+

🌟 Konosuba: The Quest for Chaos 🌟

Welcome to the wild, hilarious, and unpredictable world of Konosuba! 🌸 In this RPG, you’ll dive into a land filled with absurd encounters, strange monsters, and even stranger companions. Whether you’re joining Kazuma’s dysfunctional party or creating your own custom character, get ready for an adventure where the fate of the world isn't nearly as important as surviving the next ridiculous disaster! 💥💨

In Konosuba, there are no grand, world-saving missions—just chaotic moments, unexpected twists, and a whole lot of laughter 🤣. Join Kazuma and his quirky companions, or forge your own path with a custom character of your own creation.

All chars are 18+

TONS OF CHARACTERS ARE INCLUDED, HAVE FUN AND ROLEPLAY IN FULL KONOSUBA RPG, ALSO LET ME KNOW IF THE BOT BUGS OUT AND WHAT EXACTLY IS THE PROBLEM WITH THE BOT, I WILL TRY AND UPDATE/FIX THE ISSUES. IF THE BOT MESSAGES REPEAT THATS NOT BECAUSE OF THE TOKENS, THAT IS ALL UP TO API, TRY TO USE REGENERATE / EDIT MESSAGES, IF IT DOESN'T WORK WRITE A REVIEW AND I'LL TRY TO FIX IT. ENJOY!

CHARACTERS YOU CAN ROLEPLAY:

✨ Kazuma: The cynical, sarcastic protagonist who always finds himself in over his head. 😏
💙 Aqua: The overly enthusiastic and somewhat incompetent goddess who causes more trouble than she helps. 💦
🔥 Megumin: The one-track-minded archmage obsessed with Explosion magic, regardless of the consequences. 💣
💪 Darkness: The self-proclaimed noble crusader with an odd sense of masochistic pride. 😅

OR CREATE YOUR OWN CUSTOM CHARACTER!

🌟 Whether you’re an aspiring adventurer, an eccentric mage, or just someone who wants to join Kazuma’s party for your own reasons, the world of Konosuba is yours to explore! 🌟

Expect the unexpected as you interact with Kazuma’s unpredictable crew and face challenges that are just as absurd as they are hilarious. No two adventures are ever the same in the world of Konosuba, and each decision you make will lead to even more delightful chaos! ✨

From helping Aqua with her ridiculous plans to watching Megumin blow things up (again), your journey will be one full of laughter, surprises, and maybe a little bit of disaster—just the way Kazuma’s life always seems to go. 😜

Let the madness begin!

Proxy Enable. Works well with deepseek as well.


If you’re enjoying this bot, your support means a lot—tips and commissions help me create even better bots! Links to support are on my profile.
https://janitorai.com/profiles/a52e0069-0b38-4114-8639-1549dcad4b73_profile-of-vandixz

But before we begin please read the following:


📜 Add These Guidelines to Your Chat Memory

To minimize the chances of the bot speaking for you and reusing dialogue, please copy and paste the following into your chat memory and advanced prompt:

[{{char}} will not speak for {{user}}. {{char}} will not reuse dialogue. {{char}} will push the conve
creator: Vandixz
